zh.Sizergh Castle, Westmorland, England: 英國維斯特莫藍德希爾 霍爾
zh.Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England: 英國維斯特莫藍德希爾 霍爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter Strickland於大約1323年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德希爾 霍爾時，他的父親Sir Thomas Strickland Knt.37歲，母親Cecily Welles23歲。他於1366年與Margaret Lathom在英國波藍德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1408年3月15日之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Sizergh Castle, Westmorland, England: 英国維斯特莫藍德希爾 霍爾
zh-hans.Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England: 英国維斯特莫藍德希爾 霍爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walter Strickland于大约1323年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德希爾 霍爾时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Strickland Knt.37岁，母亲Cecily Welles23岁。他于1366年与Margaret Lathom在英国波藍德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1408年3月15日之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Strickland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Great and Little Strickland (Westmorland) or Strickland Ketel and Strickland Roger (also Westmorland). The placenames derive from Old English stīrc ‘stirk, young bullock or heifer’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter Strickland was born about 1323, in Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England, his father, Sir Thomas Strickland Knt., was 37 and his mother, Cecily Welles, was 23. He married Margaret Lathom in 1366, in Cumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died before 15 March 1408, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter Strickland est né environ 1323, à Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Strickland Knt., avait 37 ans et sa mère, Cecily Welles, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Lathom en 1366, à Cumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé avant 15 mars 1408, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Walter Strickland um 1323 in Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Strickland Knt. 37 und seine Mutter Cecily Welles 23. Er hat 1366 in Cumberland, England Margaret Lathom geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb vor 15. März 1408 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Strickland è nato il circa 1323 nel Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Strickland Knt., aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Cecily Welles, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Lathom nel 1366, nel Cumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì prima del 15 marzo 1408, nel sua cittadina.

ja.Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England: イギリスウエストモーランドシズエルグ ハル

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Stricklandが約1323年にイギリスウエストモーランドシズエルグ ハルで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Strickland Knt.は37歳，母Cecily Wellesは23歳であった。1366年にイギリスクウンバーランドでMargaret Lathomと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1408年3月15日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Strickland(이)가 대략 1323년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 시즈르그h 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Strickland Knt.(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily Welles(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1366년 영국 c벌랜드에서 Margaret Lathom(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1408년 3월 15일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.about 1323–before 15 March 1408: ойролцоогоор 1323 он–1408 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 15–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Strickland nasceu aproximadamente 1323, em Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Strickland Knt., tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Welles, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Lathom em 1366, em Cumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 15 de março de 1408, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter Strickland родился около 1323 г. в местности сизирг холл, вестморланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Strickland Knt. было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Welles, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Lathom в 1366 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер перед 15 марта 1408 г. в его родном городе.

sm.about 1323–before 15 March 1408: e tusa o le 1323–a'e le'I oo le 15 Mati 1408

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Walter Strickland nació aproximadamente 1323, en Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Strickland Knt., tenía 37 años y su mamá, Cecily Welles, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Margaret Lathom en 1366, en Cumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió antes de 15 de marzo de 1408, en su pueblo.
